description: Finishing move that causes damage over time, increased by your attack power. Lasts longer per combo point: 1 point : 324 damage over 8 secs 2 points: 460 damage over 10 secs 3 points: 618 damage over 12 secs 4 points: 798 damage over 14 secs 5 points: 1000 damage over 16 secs
name: Rupture
